_doc: Deal-data merge schema (Work-Product Framework §3a). The fields chat fills from the property/deal record so all four deal documents (Buyer LOI, Seller Response, NDA, Valuation Analysis Memo) draft from one deal context on the shared northmarq_letter base (Dialysis src/northmarq_letter.py). All docs are Northmarq-branded; 0 residual Stan Johnson Company branding.
